topic.title: Your work promoted
topic.text:
Your work promoted

 

 I'm putting together a short video for the ISE/MGEN/MSIS Awards on April 17 — and I need YOUR help.

 

The first two minutes are done. The next six are yours.

 

https://youtu.be/1o7ML-9TzNw

 

If you're a current or recent ISE, MGEN, or MSIS student at Northeastern and you've built something this year — a project, a tool, a paper, a prototype, anything real — I want to give you a shoutout in the video.

 

DM me or comment below with:

→ Your name

→ What you built (one sentence)

→ What it does for the world (one sentence)

 

https://www.linkedin.com/posts/nikbearbrown_northeastern-ise-mgen-ugcPost-7448142614715002880-Wr4w

 

Deadline: Wednesday April 15. The awards are Friday April 17.

 

This is the video that shows the provost and deans what ISE students actually do. Make sure your work is in it.

 

#Northeastern #ISE #MGEN #MSIS #GradStudents #AI #Engineering
